title: Windows install: colon path breaks checkout
action: Rename the docs/REFs file that contains a colon, narrow install.ps1 clone to a sparse checkout of skills/ + .claude-plugin/, and add a guard test that fails when any tracked path uses a Windows-illegal character.
must_haves: no tracked path contains Windows-illegal chars
install.ps1 checkout survives such a path on any ref

trace.verification_evidence:
Windows install fix — verification evidence

Verify (repo verify command), all green:
  node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs         -> 306 PASS, exit 0
  node skills/bee-hive/scripts/test_onboard_bee.mjs        -> PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1
  node scripts/test_portable_paths.mjs                     -> PASS portable-paths: 601 tracked paths are Windows-safe

Negative check (guard actually bites):
  scratch git repo containing 'bad : name.md' ->
  FAIL portable-paths: 1 tracked path(s) cannot be checked out on Windows (exit 1)

Installer rehearsal against a ref that still carries the colon path:
  git clone --quiet --depth 1 --branch main --no-checkout <repo> sc
  git -C sc sparse-checkout set skills .claude-plugin
  git -C sc checkout --quiet HEAD
  -> checkout succeeds; sc/skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs present; sc/.claude-plugin/plugin.json present; docs/ never materialized.
trace.verify_output: 306 lib checks PASS; onboard: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1; PASS portable-paths: 601 tracked paths are Windows-safe. Negative check: scratch repo with 'bad : name.md' -> FAIL exit 1. Sparse-clone rehearsal: git clone --no-checkout + sparse-checkout set skills .claude-plugin + checkout HEAD, on a ref that still carries the colon path -> checkout succeeds, skills/bee-hive/scripts/onboard_bee.mjs present.
